skill.name: security-management
skill.description: Review UniFi firewall zones, access control rules, guest vouchers, and security posture for audits and compliance checks.
skill.summary: Audit UniFi network security settings and guest access controls.
skill.author: DataKnifeAI

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported external command and weak cryptography patterns, but review found only Markdown tool names and ordinary prose. No executable code, prompt injection, network exfiltration, or malicious intent was found in the scanned file.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Tool Names Misclassified as Commands
low_findings.description: Backticked UniFi tool names and workflow steps were flagged as shell execution, but they are Markdown documentation only. No Ruby backtick execution or command invocation is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The cited lines contain Markdown list items and tool identifiers. There is no executable Ruby code or shell syntax in the file.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Pattern in Prose
low_findings.description: The weak cryptography alerts map to normal documentation text, including the skill description and response description wording. No cryptographic function or algorithm selection is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The cited lines are prose about ACLs and firewall zone descriptions. I found no code that implements or recommends weak cryptography.

content.value_statement: Network teams need clear reviews of firewall zones, ACLs, and guest access controls. This skill guides Claude, Codex, and Claude Code through UniFi security audits.
actual_capabilities: Reviews UniFi firewall zone configuration and segmentation intent.
Lists and interprets access control rules for policy review.
Checks guest hotspot vouchers for status and expiration concerns.
Uses network information to support security and compliance checks.
Produces audit findings, risk notes, and improvement recommendations.
limitations: Requires compatible UniFi data tools to retrieve live network information.
Does not create or enforce firewall rules by itself.
Cannot prove compliance without complete policy and evidence records.
Recommendations still require administrator approval before deployment.

use_cases.title: Quarterly Firewall Review
use_cases.description: Review zone configuration, ACL purpose, and segmentation gaps before a scheduled security review.

use_cases.title: Guest Access Cleanup
use_cases.description: Find active, expired, or risky guest vouchers and prepare a cleanup plan.

use_cases.title: Compliance Evidence Preparation
use_cases.description: Collect security posture notes and recommended remediation items for an audit packet.

prompt_templates.title: Show Firewall Zones
prompt_templates.prompt: Show all UniFi firewall zones and summarize their purpose.

prompt_templates.title: Review ACL Rules
prompt_templates.prompt: Review all access control rules and identify rules that need owner or purpose clarification.

prompt_templates.title: Audit Guest Access
prompt_templates.prompt: List active guest vouchers, note expiration issues, and recommend cleanup actions.

prompt_templates.title: Run Security Audit
prompt_templates.prompt: Perform a complete UniFi security audit covering zones, ACLs, guest access, and compliance risks.

output: Summary of rule count, enabled status, and policy coverage.
Rules grouped by purpose, risk, and missing documentation.
Recommended changes for stale, broad, or unclear rules.
Firewall zone observations with segmentation concerns.
Guest access voucher status and cleanup recommendations.
Compliance findings with priority and remediation guidance.

best_practices: Confirm administrative intent before changing security policies.
Review firewall zones and ACLs on a regular schedule.
Keep audit notes tied to evidence from current UniFi data.
anti_patterns: Do not treat broad allow rules as acceptable without a documented purpose.
Do not leave guest vouchers active after their business need ends.
Do not rely on this skill as the only compliance evidence source.

faq.question: Does this skill change firewall rules?
faq.answer: No. It focuses on review, audit, and recommendations unless connected tools provide approved change workflows.

faq.question: Can it review guest network vouchers?
faq.answer: Yes. It can list vouchers, check status, and identify expiration or cleanup concerns.

faq.question: What UniFi areas does it cover?
faq.answer: It covers firewall zones, access control rules, guest access vouchers, and supporting network information.

faq.question: Is it suitable for compliance audits?
faq.answer: It can prepare findings and evidence notes, but formal compliance still requires complete records and human review.

faq.question: Does it need live UniFi access?
faq.answer: Live data requires compatible UniFi tools. Without them, it can only guide review steps and report structure.

faq.question: Can it find risky segmentation gaps?
faq.answer: Yes. It can compare zones, ACLs, and policy intent to identify likely segmentation issues.
